---
title: "Group A — Data Dossier"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here("data", "WORKSHOP-2026
data/group_a_yogurt/00_sample_ids_yogurt.csv"))
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here("data", "WORKSHOP-2026
group_a_yogurt/01_participant_metadata_yogurt.csv"))
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here("data", "WORKSHOP-2026
group_a_yogurt/02_qpcr_results_yogurt.csv"))
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here("data", "WORKSHOP-2026
group_a_yogurt/03_luminex_results_yogurt.csv"))
```

```{r}
sample_ids <- read_csv("data/group_a_yogurt/00_sample_ids_yogurt.csv")
glimpse(sample_ids)
```

```{r}
participant_metadata <- read_csv("data/group_a_yogurt/01_participant_metadata_yogurt.csv")
glimpse(participant_metadata)
```

```{r}
qpcr_results <- read_csv("data/group_a_yogurt/02_qpcr_results_yogurt.csv")
glimpse(qpcr_results)
```

```{r}
luminex_results <- read_csv("data/group_a_yogurt/03_luminex_results_yogurt.csv")
glimpse(luminex_results)
```

```{r}
final-presentation.html
```


---

## 2️⃣ Render to HTML

In your terminal:

```{r}
quarto render final-presentation.qmd
```
